creator: parv_@yahoo.com
text:
aspell port seems to be broken for quite some time; below is the 
 make log:


===>  Building for aspell-0.33.6.3
gmake  all-recursive
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/source/ports/textproc/aspell/work/aspell-.33.6.3'
Making all in util
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/source/ports/textproc/aspell/work/aspell-.33.6.3/util'
/bin/sh ../libtool --mode=compile c++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I.. -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include  -g -O -pipe -march=pentiumpro -fmemoize-lookups -fsave-memoized -c file_util.cc
rm -f .libs/file_util.lo
c++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -g -O -pipe -march=pentiumpro -fmemoize-lookups -fsave-memoized -c file_util.cc  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/file_util.lo
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/source/ports/textproc/aspell/work/aspell-.33.6.3/util'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/source/ports/textproc/aspell/work/aspell-.33.6.3'
*** Error code 2

Stop in /source/ports/textproc/aspell.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /source/ports/textproc/aspell.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /source/ports/textproc/aspell.

Fix: 

unknown; sorry...
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/textproc/aspell && make
